topic: OpenAI Codex Plugins Guide: 90+ Integrations for Enterprise AI Workflows

Focuses on plugin architecture: skills, apps, MCP servers
Discusses governance and admin controls
Covers enterprise customer examples like Cisco and Nvidia
Enterprise AI automation with Codex plugins, memory, multi-day agents
April 2026 update coverage

stats.fact: OpenAI released 20+ initial Codex plugins on March 26, 2026, then expanded to 90+ additional plugins in April 2026
Codex reached 4+ million weekly active developers by April 21, 2026 — up from 3 million just two weeks earlier
Codex usage in ChatGPT Business and Enterprise grew 6x since January 2026 by April 2026
Codex has 1.6 million weekly active users — more than tripling after February launch of GPT-5.3 Codex
OpenAI had 1 million+ business customers as of November 2025, providing Codex a large enterprise distribution base
Codex usage was up 10x since August 2025 per OpenAI's November 2025 business update
Enterprise SIs including Accenture, Capgemini, CGI, Cognizant, Infosys, PwC, and TCS are partnering with OpenAI on Codex deployment
Approximately 4% of all GitHub public commits are now authored by Claude Code — Codex faces stiff competition for enterprise AI coding

angles: Complete taxonomy of all 90+ Codex plugin categories (DevOps, communication, databases, project management, security, design) with real examples
How enterprise IT admins deploy plugins at scale using JSON governance policies and INSTALLED_BY_DEFAULT controls

Step-by-step guide to installing, configuring, and building custom Codex plugins
ROI analysis: how enterprises like Cisco, Rakuten, and Ramp measure Codex plugin productivity gains
Security and compliance: Codex plugin governance with audit logs, eDiscovery, SIEM integration
Codex plugins vs. Claude Code extensions vs. GitHub Copilot extensions — which enterprise plugin ecosystem wins?
Building your own Codex plugin: skills authoring, MCP server setup, app connector creation
Multi-agent workflows with Codex plugins: how plugins enable cross-tool automation pipelines
